results.title: Shaurya Jain
highlights:
Senior GenAI Engineer (UPS) | RAG, Retrieval, LLM Agents, LLMOps | ML Systems | Open to Senior ML/GenAI roles
...
Senior Generative AI Engineer at [UPS](https://www.linkedin.com/company/ups)
...
I build production ML and GenAI systems that ship, scale, and stay reliable. At UPS, I own customer-facing GenAI work across search and support, including retrieval and grounding pipelines and an agentic layer for multi-intent workflows under strict safety and latency constraints. Previously, I built ML platforms in healthcare and commerce where cost asymmetry matters, including forecasting and planning systems that bias toward safe coverage, and data-quality-first matching pipelines that turn messy inputs into deterministic outputs. I’m targeting Senior ML Engineer, GenAI Engineer, and Senior Data Scientist roles focused on retrieval, NLP, agentic systems, and production ML. Longer term, I’m building a public body of work around evaluation, reliability, and pragmatic ML systems design.
...
### Senior Generative AI Engineer at [UPS](https://www.linkedin.com/company/ups) (Current)
...
At UPS, I owned production GenAI systems that power UPS.com Search and customer support. I shipped a contract-first Search RAG service with rollout-safe releases and hard safety gating, then rebuilt the full query-to-answer pipeline to reduce unanswered demand without loosening policy controls. In parallel, I am building an agentic orchestration layer that turns the RAG service into a reusable tool for multi-intent support flows. I also owned a localization automation platform that enforces terminology, style, and quality policies across live locales while keeping placeholder and glossary integrity at scale. Impacts Shipped UPS.com Search RAG service handling ~211K calls per 30 days with ~99.88% request success and ~0.11% 5xx via defensive fallbacks and release discipline Cut unanswered Search queries by ~50% by redesigning query understanding, retrieval, inference, and grounding under latency and safety constraints Delivered localization automation across 21 live locales with a path to 113 locales using config-driven policies and multi-format ingestion and output Reduced linguist review from 100% to ~15–20% using translation memory plus caching with ~65% hit rate, sustaining ~99.8% placeholder preservation and ~96% glossary compliance
...
Masters of Science in Computer Science(Specialization in Machine Learning/Artificial Intelligence)

Lead Data Scientist at [UPS](https://www.linkedin.com/company/ups)
...
“AI isn’t just about models; it’s about making data-driven decisions that create real-world impact.” A Data Science & AI Leader with 8+ years of experience transforming complex data into AI-powered decisions that scale to 100M+ users and drive $40M+ in business impact. My work blends Machine Learning, Generative AI, and Large Language Models (LLMs) to create high-impact recommendation systems, NLP solutions, and predictive analytics that fuel engagement, personalization, and revenue growth. At Forbes, I have built and deployed AI-powered recommendation engines and personalization systems, leading to an 18% boost in engagement and an 8% increase in conversions. I specialize in ML explainability, retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), and scalable AI infrastructure, ensuring AI solutions are trustworthy, interpretable, and optimized for real-world applications. 🔹 Key Data Science & AI Expertise: ✔ End-to-End Data Science Pipelines – Data preprocessing, feature engineering, model training & deployment ✔ Scalable AI & ML Systems – Real-time personalization & AI automation for 100M+ users ✔ Deep Learning & NLP – Generative AI, Transformers, LLMs, RAG ✔ Recommendation Systems – Collaborative filtering, hybrid models, engagement optimization ✔ Machine Learning Explainability – Bias mitigation, fairness in AI, interpretable ML 🚀 Passionate About: I thrive on solving high-impact AI & Data Science challenges—whether it’s building LLM-powered insights, automating decision-making with ML, or driving AI strategy for large-scale applications. Let’s connect and discuss how AI & Data Science can drive real business transformation!!
...

Leading AI & Generative AI innovations at Forbes, scaling AI-powered personalization for 100M+ users & driving $40M+ in revenue. 🔹 Key Achievements: 🚀 Spearheaded real-time AI-powered recommendation engines, integrating RecSys, LLMs, and Transformers to enhance content personalization, boosting engagement by 18% and conversions by 8%. 📊 Designed & deployed a Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) system with Gemini-2 LLM, automating executive insights and reducing data query time by 75%. ⚡ Led Generative AI applications (BART, BRIO, PaLM2) for article summarization, shortening article length by 70% while increasing readability by 25%, improving user retention by 10%. 🛠 Developed advanced customer segmentation models (Clustering, LGBM, Polars) to optimize content recommendations, increasing targeted marketing ROI by 19%. 🔍 Implemented explainable AI (XAI) & ML fairness models, ensuring bias mitigation & interpretability in AI-driven personalization. 🎯 Led cross-functional AI strategy with Product, Engineering & Marketing teams, ensuring seamless AI adoption & alignment with business goals.
...

highlights:

Lead Data Scientist at [UPS](https://www.linkedin.com/company/ups)

I have been working with complex datasets for over a decade in various academic and industrial settings. Since 2021 I have been a data scientist at UPS, steadily growing both my technical and project management skills and experience. In this role, I am passionate about combining data with custom modeling/analysis/visualization tools to discover useful insights and deliver value to the business. I also enjoy leveraging my varied experience (molecular simulations, physical chemistry research, etc.) by finding transferable lessons between seemingly unrelated domains.

Built models incorporating techniques such as Natural Language Processing (NLP), Generative AI, embedding-based vector search, and gradient boosting regression/classification. Show less

#### Data Scientist

Provided consulting, analysis, and prediction modeling services to internal UPS clients on a broad range of projects, including prediction of airline payloads, prediction of vehicle breakdowns, analysis of worker retention data, and automated tariff classification. Worked within a small team of ~10 data scientists, typically collaborating with 2-3 colleagues for each project. Contributed to the full data science lifecycle, from exploratory analysis to proof-of-concept modeling, validation testing, data pipeline development, and collaborating with other teams to deploy finalized models to production. Helped develop metrics to keep project goals aligned with business needs and outcomes. Employed modeling techniques including gradient boosting regression/classification, deep learning, and Natural Language Processing (NLP). Show less

results.title: Matthew L.
highlights:
After completing the Industrial Engineering program at the Ohio State University, my career began at UPS Customer Solutions in the Supply Chain Optimization group located in Alpharetta, GA. In this position I learned the foundation of network design and gained proficiency building solutions leveraging supply chain modeling software IBM LogicNet and LLamasoft Supply Chain Guru in combination with data management and visualization tools SQL, Alteryx, Tableau/PowerBI to engage directly with both internal and external clients. Following UPS, I accepted a Data Analyst position at Cardinal Health located in Dublin, OH. This role transitioned me into medical and pharmaceutical healthcare logistics as a member of a scrum team that was central to creating enterprise data lake reporting solutions. My primary responsibilities included translating business strategies, goals, and requirements, developing and deploying visualization reports through Tableau, and configuring Alteryx queries and workflows. Currently, I am enrolled as a.Net/C# Student. Both, my past exposure working in software and solution development, and my more recent personal interest learning Unity 3D is what lead me to pivot my career into.Net/C# development.
...

...
- Contributed to developing processes that reduced the average Tableau dashboard refresh times by 300%, and increased the average number of daily dashboard users from 15 to 70 participants.
...
Today I'm launching Key Element , a technology consulting and development firm that helps growing businesses unlock growth with AI.
...
I've always been inspired by the vision of starting my own company. I've gravitated toward roles on the frontier of technology, where owning the outcome was part of the job. Product management and a deep passion for AI have been quietly building the skills and instincts I'd need to recognize an opportunity like this one, in an age of real uncertainty and disruption.
...
AI is changing what a small team can build, how fast, and at what cost. Especially in software. The technology isn't the bottleneck anymore. Translation is: turning a business problem into an AI-powered system that actually works every day.
...
That's what Key Element is for. We bring together AI strategy, data analytics and integration, and custom software development as one end-to-end practice. Every engagement is tied to an outcome you can measure, not a deliverable you can file. Whether the form is a shipped system, a built pipeline, or a strategy your team can run, the common thread is a number that moves.
...
My team is Hiring!

...
a perfect fit.

results.title: Optum Hiring Data Scientist | Jobformore
highlights:
Optum Hiring Data Scientist | Jobformore
...
# Data Scientist
...
Optum is seeking a Data Science professional who is passionate about applying machine learning, Generative AI, and Large Language Models (LLMs) to solve complex healthcare problems on a scale. Imagine working with massive volumes of healthcare data spanning clinical, claims, behavioral, and digital interactions – powering intelligent personalization, discovery, and decision support for millions of members, providers, and care teams.
...
At Optum, the Data Science mission is to transform healthcare data into robust, scalable AI solutions, including LLM based and Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) systems that combine enterprise knowledge with advanced language models to deliver accurate, contextual, and trustworthy insights. These solutions help uncover deep usage patterns, member journeys, and care signals that inform and continuously evolve Optum’s digital products, clinical platforms, and healthcare services.
...
Your work will directly influence how healthcare consumers engage with digital experiences, how clinicians access timely insights, and how business and care strategies are shaped through data. By joining Optum’s data science team, you will be part of an exciting journey to build advanced ML and GenAI driven products, grounded in responsible AI principles, that operate at enterprise scale and create meaningful impact across the healthcare ecosystem.
